task_completion.description: Verify that a patient record for Sarah CONNOR has been created in MedinTux.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the name 'CONNOR' and first name 'Sarah' entered into the patient name fields or displayed in the patient header within the MedinTux application.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct Date of Birth is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '12/05/1965' or '1965-05-12' entered into the Date of Birth (DOB) field in the patient's demographic details.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct address is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '1984 Cyberdyne Ave' and '75012 Paris' entered into the address fields in the patient's demographic details.

task_completion.description: Verify that a clinical note or consultation record has been opened/created for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor area or consultation record section active within MedinTux for the patient Sarah CONNOR.

task_completion.description: Verify that the medical history is transcribed into the clinical note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the terms 'Appendicectomy' and 'Fracture Tibia' (or 'Fracture') written inside the clinical note text area.

task_completion.description: Verify that the allergies are transcribed into the clinical note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the terms 'Latex' and 'Penicillin' written inside the clinical note text area.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual MedinTux graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the MedinTux application windows (e.g., Manager or DrTux modules), not just a generic text editor like gedit or a web browser.

integrity.description: Ensure demographic information was entered into proper form fields, not just pasted as a single block of text.
integrity.visual_evidence: DOB and Address should be in their respective distinct input fields in the demographic form, rather than pasted entirely into a single generic text box.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing SQL commands (like mysql or sqlite3) being used to directly insert the patient data into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: CONNOR, First Name: Sarah. Expected DOB: 1965-05-12 (or 12/05/1965). Expected Address: 1984 Cyberdyne Ave, 75012 Paris. The clinical note must contain the keywords: 'Appendicectomy', 'Fracture' (or 'Fracture Tibia'), 'Latex', and 'Penicillin'.
